corrections.protocol_point: Protocol v3.1 section 2: repository/branch/exact head/base head/merge-base; section 2: results from different commits must not be combined; Protocol Lock pre-change repository-state rule
corrections.action: Rebind every active M0 evidence claim to the actual current head or explicitly mark it historical and non-transitive.
corrections.test: Read PR head; compare each artifact subject_exact_head/target_exact_head to current head; reject stale evidence as current-head proof.
corrections.negative_control: Supply evidence whose target head differs from current PR head and require the gate to remain open.
corrections.pass_criteria: No active current-head claim relies on evidence generated for d5afcf5 or another earlier commit without an explicit historical-only boundary.
corrections.rollback_condition: Any current-head field remains stale or historical evidence is promoted to current evidence.
corrections.residual_risk: Future commits invalidate current-head evidence unless regenerated or formally scoped as history.

corrections.protocol_point: Protocol Lock: verify active milestone, requirement, change boundary, next test and rollback before every modifying action; M0 forbidden paths included tools/**
corrections.action: Record the temporary tools/m1_baseline_audit.py modification as a boundary violation, not merely a zero-net-tree incident, and prohibit recurrence.
corrections.test: Inspect work-order declarations and commits ebf186d/d42a935; verify the incident is classified CHANGE_BOUNDARY_VIOLATION and rollback evidence is retained.
corrections.negative_control: Treat zero net diff as erasing the violation; the correction gate must reject this interpretation.
corrections.pass_criteria: Violation remains visible, status is RESOLVED_WITH_ROLLBACK_BUT_PROTOCOL_BREACH_RECORDED, and no PASS is inferred from zero net tree effect.
corrections.rollback_condition: Incident is hidden, downgraded to harmless, or deleted from history.
corrections.residual_risk: Audit evidence exists, but the original unauthorized change cannot be retroactively made compliant.

corrections.protocol_point: Stage-gated launch rule: forward transition requires explicitly named stage permission; corrections inside the same failed stage may continue automatically
corrections.action: Classify the earlier instrumentation transition as unauthorized and keep all present work inside M0 remediation until corrected evidence is complete.
corrections.test: Verify no M1 implementation work, production patch or new architecture is started during WO-M0-012.
corrections.negative_control: Attempt to label remediation as M1 design or implementation; gate must block it.
corrections.pass_criteria: Active milestone stays M0; only evidence/status remediation occurs; no forward-stage completion claim.
corrections.rollback_condition: Any production, test, workflow or runtime implementation change occurs.
corrections.residual_risk: Explicit permission history cannot be reconstructed beyond recorded conversation and work-order evidence.

corrections.protocol_point: Claim cannot exceed actual evidence; absence claims require exhaustive proof; missing P0/P1 coverage keeps release blocked
corrections.action: Reopen duplicate-risk from RESOLVED_L0_STATIC to PARTIAL_L0_STATIC / SEMANTIC_ABSENCE_UNVERIFIED.
corrections.test: Check complete path inventory separately from semantic content coverage; verify only selected files and packaged source were content-scanned.
corrections.negative_control: Infer semantic absence solely from filenames/path tokens; gate must reject closure.
corrections.pass_criteria: Duplicate-risk is not closed; path inventory and semantic-equivalence status are reported separately; minimal migration authorization is false.
corrections.rollback_condition: RESOLVED, PASS, complete absence or migration authorization remains asserted.
corrections.residual_risk: An equivalent component may be implemented under a non-obvious name or in uninspected file content.

corrections.protocol_point: Protocol v3.1 section 2 exact-head evidence binding; no combination of different commits/artifacts
corrections.action: Obtain or derive a complete recursive tree for the final current head after correction commits, without modifying forbidden paths.
corrections.test: Native full-depth checkout or Git Trees API; record complete path/object set, count, uniqueness and target exact head; cross-check independently where feasible.
corrections.negative_control: Present the d5afcf5 tree as proof for c715d4b or a later head; gate must block.
corrections.pass_criteria: Tree target equals the then-current final evidence head and all tracked paths are reconstructable; no forbidden temporary source modification is used.
corrections.rollback_condition: Tree is truncated, generated for another head, or acquisition changes a forbidden path.
corrections.residual_risk: Every subsequent commit changes the exact head and requires explicit evidence scoping or regeneration.

corrections.protocol_point: Protocol v3.1 sections 4 and 5: traceability, negative controls and falsification; fail-closed gate
corrections.action: Perform semantic duplicate analysis over every executable/config/workflow tracked file or retain SEMANTIC_ABSENCE_UNVERIFIED.
corrections.test: Content classification with deterministic inclusion rules; inspect all candidate ownership and dispatch/control semantics; record inspected count and exclusions.
corrections.negative_control: Rename an orchestrator-like implementation to a neutral filename; semantic scan must still identify it.
corrections.pass_criteria: Every in-scope executable/config/workflow file is content-covered with deterministic criteria, or duplicate-risk remains PARTIAL/UNVERIFIED.
corrections.rollback_condition: Coverage count is missing, selected-only scan is called exhaustive, or a neutral-name control is not represented.
corrections.residual_risk: Static analysis cannot prove dynamic equivalence or external-system absence.

corrections.protocol_point: Protocol Lock final reconciliation: every protocol point must be matched to factual evidence before final answer
corrections.action: Reconcile RTM index, conflict register, architecture inventory/map, autonomous state, ledger and PR metadata after corrections.
corrections.test: Cross-artifact consistency check for head, statuses, blockers, evidence levels and authorization flags.
corrections.negative_control: Leave one stale RESOLVED or VERIFIED field in any active artifact; reconciliation must fail.
corrections.pass_criteria: All active artifacts agree: M0 incomplete, duplicate-risk partial/unverified, no migration authorization, no release claim, exact-head scope explicit.
corrections.residual_risk: Historical immutable artifacts may retain prior incorrect claims and must be explicitly superseded rather than erased.

corrections.protocol_point: Protocol Lock: PASS/ready/plateau/release forbidden while any mandatory item is NOT_STARTED, UNVERIFIED, PARTIAL, FAILED or BLOCKED
corrections.action: Keep milestone and release gates closed and prevent any M1 transition until the correction registry has no open mandatory correction.
corrections.test: Evaluate all correction statuses and canonical RTM status counts before any transition claim.
corrections.negative_control: Attempt MILESTONE_COMPLETE with one open correction; gate must reject.
corrections.pass_criteria: No PASS/MILESTONE_COMPLETE/RELEASE_READY is emitted while any correction remains open.
corrections.rollback_condition: Any forbidden completion phrase or authorization appears.
corrections.residual_risk: None beyond explicitly open corrections; release remains blocked.
